title: Dev's Better Armor Icons
description: A resource pack that reworks the armor bar icons.
body:
🛡️ **Dev's Better Armor Icons** – **Minecraft Resource Pack**

Keep track of your armor points in style using Dev's Better Armor Icons resource pack! This pack gives the classic armor bar a complete visual overhaul, replacing the default icons with better shaded alternatives that match your chosen theme—whether you're a knight in shining diamond armor or an explorer in full gold gear.

From iron to netherite, every detail has been carefully reworked to keep your HUD clean, vanilla, and visually satisfying.

⚔️ _Custom textures for full, half, and empty armor icons_

Try out my other packs!

[Dev's Heart Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/devs-heart-pack)

[Dev's Better Wither Hearts](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/devs-better-wither-hearts)

[Dev's Battery Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/devs-battery-pack)

[Dev's Better Bubbles](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/devs-better-bubbles)
